prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-DRILLBITS-7517SB35 Product Type: FASTENER_DRIVE_BIT Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Universal Tool Chrome Vanadium Steel Tamper-Proof Drill Bits and Magnetizer Set Description: The Universal Tool Chrome Vanadium Steel Tamper-Proof Drill Bits and Magnetizer Set contains 34 pieces which are handy to have in the workshop for making or repairing anything you can think of: electronics, automobiles, watches, jewelry, glasses, and any other project you can think of. Why waste time and money trying to find a maintenance specialist when you can have one set that will pay for itself? The wide assortment of bits allows you to open various kinds of fasteners.

The chrome vanadium steel tamper-proof bits and magnetizer set (34 pc.) Includes:
-9 pc. Security Torx: T8, T10, T15, T20, T25, T27, T30, T35, T40
-3 PC. Pozidriv: PZ1, PZ2, PZ3
-4 PC. Spanner head: U4, U6, U8, U10
-2 PC. Phillips: PH1, PH2
-1 PC. Slotted (mm): 6.0
-6 pc. Security Hex (mm): H2, H2.5, H3, H4, H5, H6
-4 PC. Tri-wing: Y1, Y2, Y3, Y4
-3 PC. Torq: S6, S8, S10 Search Terms: craftsmen hobbyists repairmen DIY jewelry Features: - STURDY MATERIAL - The set comes in a pack of 34 bits that are made of Chrome Vanadium for durability. - TAMPER PROOF - The Tamper-proof bits help prevent your work from being tampered with. - EASY TRANSPORTATION - This set comes already organized and labeled in an easy to carry storage case to make transportation easier. - MUST HAVE - It is useful to have to help you build and fix items. - GREAT FOR ANY PROJECT - This product is great for craftsmen, hobbyists, repairmen, DIY, jewelry, electronics, automobiles, watches, glasses, home improvement, and more. === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
